subject: Sports
title: Showtime Lakers
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Showtime Lakers.

hook.text: Fast breaks, no-look passes, and Hollywood glamour. The 1980s Lakers made basketball entertainment.

buildup.text: Magic Johnson and Kareem Abdul-Jabbar led a Lakers team that played at blistering speed.

discovery.text: They won five championships in nine years with a style so exciting it earned the name 'Showtime.'

twist.text: Jack Nicholson and other celebrities sat courtside. The Lakers turned NBA games into cultural events.

climax.text: Showtime didn't just win games—it proved basketball could rival football as America's favorite spectacle.

punchline.text: Basketball meets Hollywood. The Lakers made the NBA glamorous.

quiz.question: What style of play defined the Showtime Lakers?
